claim_text: CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_REFRESH_TOKEN env var, when set, exchanges directly for an access token without a browser. Requires CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_SCOPES.
label: CONFIRMED
notes: Single primary source but it is the canonical Anthropic spec; treated as CONFIRMED for that reason

claim_text: Koyeb Volumes are restricted to non-Eco / non-Free tiers and are in public preview with explicit no-redundancy data-loss caveats.
section: 3. Koyeb instance shape for our specific footprint
label: CONFIRMED

claim_text: Standard-Nano on Koyeb costs $2.68/month and supports scale-to-zero with Light Sleep at 200ms cold start.
label: CONFIRMED

claim_text: The Telegram channel plugin has at least five publicly tracked operational bugs affecting inbound message delivery, polling-loop reconnect, multi-process conflict, and Docker stdio transport.
label: CONFIRMED
notes: Five independent GitHub issue reports; outbound side works

claim_text: Issue #54008 specifically reports stdio-pipe failure between Claude Code and the spawned plugin subprocess in Docker — the substrate we plan to use.
label: PROBABLY TRUE
notes: Single source for the specific Docker symptom

claim_text: Anthropic's scheduled-tasks doc explicitly recommends Routines / GitHub Actions / Desktop scheduled tasks (NOT /loop or CronCreate) for cron-driven automation that needs to run unattended.
label: CONFIRMED

claim_text: Channels in Claude Code are in research preview, requiring v2.1.80+ and claude.ai login (no API key).
section: 7. Custom MCP channels in research preview
label: CONFIRMED

claim_text: Claude Code's --bare mode supports ANTHROPIC_API_KEY auth but explicitly NOT the keychain/OAuth path; channels are incompatible with --bare.
label: CONFIRMED

claim_text: HTTP/SSE transport for Claude Code channels works as an alternative to stdio, but is undocumented Anthropic-side.
label: POSSIBLY TRUE
notes: Single Tier-2 community source claims it works; primary docs only document stdio

claim_text: GHA cron is best-effort; idempotency must be enforced application-side. Stripe / GitHub HMAC + timestamp pattern is industry best practice for webhook authentication.
label: CONFIRMED

claim_text: Anthropic acquired Bun in December 2025; Claude Code is built on Bun runtime.
section: 3. Koyeb instance shape for our specific footprint
label: PROBABLY TRUE
notes: Tier-3 sources; no Anthropic press release in our corpus

claim_text: Bun has documented memory-leak behavior in long-running production HTTP services; Trigger.dev publicly documented and fixed one such leak.
section: 3. Koyeb instance shape for our specific footprint
label: PROBABLY TRUE
notes: Tier-2 production migration writeup; corroborated by Tier-4 community signal

claim_text: Anthropic uses the anthropic-device-id cookie (10-month lifespan) which is a device-fingerprint signal; sudden region/IP changes for the same account are an industry-standard anomaly trigger.
label: POSSIBLY TRUE
notes: Cookie inventory documented; revocation behavior inferred from industry practice

claim_text: Refresh-token TTL for CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_REFRESH_TOKEN is not publicly documented.
label: UNVERIFIED
notes: Absence of evidence — explicitly flagged in Needs Verification section

claim_text: Koyeb application binding must be 0.0.0.0 (not 127.0.0.1) for external traffic to reach the container.
label: CONFIRMED

label: CONFIRMED
